payload.label: dresser
payload.long_description: Dark stained wooden dresser with multiple horizontal drawers and decorative carved trim; metal drawer pulls visible across the front, top surface with small objects partially visible; lower front is partially occluded by a bed in the foreground and the right edge of the dresser is cropped by the image border, appears close to the camera (approximately 1.5 m).

message.content: {"label":"dresser","short_description":"dark wooden dresser, partial view","long_description":"Dark stained wooden dresser with multiple horizontal drawers and decorative carved trim; metal drawer pulls visible across the front, top surface with small objects partially visible; lower front is partially occluded by a bed in the foreground and the right edge of the dresser is cropped by the image border, appears close to the camera (approximately 1.5 m).","attributes":["dark stained wood","multiple drawers","decorative carved trim","metal drawer pulls","polished finish","top surface visible","partially occluded by bed","edge-cropped/right-side cut off"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.5}
